title: dryopsis × fauriei
intro: Dryopsis × fauriei, also known as the Korean fern, is a type of hybrid plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopsis × fauriei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, or as a supplement in capsule form.
